title: Basic Performance Equation Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the components of the basic performance equation (CPU Time = Instruction Count * CPI * Clock Cycle Time) and how they interrelate to determine overall processor performance.
relationships: IC and CPI are multiplied to get Total Cycles
Total Cycles and T are multiplied to calculate CPU Time
Improving any factor (reducing IC, CPI, or T) decreases CPU Time and improves performance
